story.title: Timeless Horizon
story.logline: When brilliant physicist Alessandra discovers a way to communicate with her past self, she must navigate the consequences of altering her own timeline before a ruthless time smuggler named Ryker erases her from existence.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet our protagonist, Alessandra, a brilliant physicist who has spent her life studying the mysteries of time. She finally discovers a way to communicate with her past self, but soon realizes that this innovation has catastrophic consequences.

acts.label: Rising Action
acts.description: As Alessandra tries to understand the implications of her discovery, she is pursued by a ruthless time smuggler named Ryker who seeks to exploit her technology for his own gain. Alessandra must outwit Ryker and his henchmen to protect her research.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: Alessandra faces a desperate choice: use her technology to alter her own timeline or risk everything to protect the integrity of the timestream. Meanwhile, Ryker's true intentions are revealed, and Alessandra must stop him before it's too late.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: The consequences of Alessandra's decision are revealed, and she must come to terms with the new reality she has created. Ryker's fate is sealed, and Alessandra must find a way to live with the knowledge of the choices she has made.

story.protagonist: Alessandra, a brilliant and determined physicist
story.antagonist: Ryker, a ruthless and cunning time smuggler
story.world: In the near-future, humanity has developed advanced technology that allows for time travel, but at a terrible cost: the timestream is fragile and prone to catastrophic disruptions.
